docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,018.83 FILED BY MA, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE BANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHASE BANK $2,021.83 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,086.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-19-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE BANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER MA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHASE BANK IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JAYSON TONG VICE PRESIDENT AND BRANCH MANAGER. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JPMORGAN CHASE, 818 SEVENTH STREET, STE 930, L.A. CA 90017
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, ALEXANDER
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE BANK
